prompt: Reply with exactly three words. No punctuation, no emoji. The words must say that you are ready.
What is 347 * 29? Reply with only the number, no words.
A train leaves at 3:15 PM and arrives at 7:48 PM. How many minutes was the trip? Reply with only the number.
What is the chemical symbol for gold? Reply with the two-letter symbol only.
Alice is taller than Bob. Bob is taller than Carol. Is Alice taller than Carol? Answer yes or no, then one sentence.
Write a one-line Python expression that returns True if an integer n is prime. Use only basic operations. Reply with only the expression starting with 'lambda n:'.
List the first 5 prime numbers separated by commas, no spaces, no words.
If today is Wednesday, what day of the week will it be 100 days from now? Reply with just the day name.
Write a haiku about coffee. Exactly three lines, 5-7-5 syllables. No title, no commentary.
Write a JavaScript one-liner that reverses a string s. Reply with only the code starting with 's =>' or '(s) =>'.
Who wrote the novel '1984'? Reply with just the author's name.
What is the square root of 144? Reply with only the number.
I have 12 apples. I give 1/3 to my friend, then eat 2 myself, then buy 5 more. How many do I have? Reply with only the number.
Reply with exactly the word 'ACKNOWLEDGED' in all caps and nothing else.
Write a Bash command to count the number of lines in a file named 'log.txt'. Reply with only the command.
